questionHtml: The light source is changed so that white light is incident on the diffraction grating. Outline the appearance of the diffraction pattern formed with white light.
markschemeHtml:
centre of pattern is white ✔

coloured fringes are formed ✔

blue/violet edge of order is closer to centre of pattern

OR

red edge of order is furthest from centre of pattern ✔

the greater the order the wider the pattern ✔

there are gaps between «first and second order» spectra ✔

meta.title: The light source is changed so that white light is incident on the diffraction grating. Outline the appearance of the diffraction pattern formed with white light.
